scripts.dev: concurrently --success=all -n backend,frontend "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend-setup: cross-env SETUP=true docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml up --build
scripts.lint: concurrently --success=all -n backend,frontend "npm run -w @plant-care/backend lint" "npm run -w @plant-care/frontend lint"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently --success=all -n backend,frontend "npm run -w @plant-care/backend typecheck" "npm run -w @plant-care/frontend typecheck"
scripts.format: concurrently --success=all -n backend,frontend "npm run -w @plant-care/backend format" "npm run -w @plant-care/frontend format"
scripts.format:check: concurrently --success=all -n backend,frontend "npm run -w @plant-care/backend format:check" "npm run -w @plant-care/frontend format:check"
